task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the parent page titled 'History Course Portal' with introductory text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A WordPress page editor or published page showing the title 'History Course Portal' and some introductory text in the body.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the child page titled 'Apollo 11 & 12 Documents' with 'History Course Portal' set as its parent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A WordPress page editor showing the title 'Apollo 11 & 12 Documents' and the 'Page Attributes' sidebar section showing 'History Course Portal' selected as the Parent Page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'saturn_v_diagram.jpg' image is set as the featured image for the child page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Featured Image' sidebar section in the WordPress editor displaying the Saturn V diagram image.

task_completion.description: Verify that download links for 'apollo_11_press_kit.pdf' and 'apollo_12_press_kit.pdf' are present in the child page body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress editor body or published page showing links, file blocks, or attachment links for both 'apollo_11_press_kit.pdf' and 'apollo_12_press_kit.pdf'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the child page is password protected with the password 'Orbit1969'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Visibility' setting in the WordPress editor sidebar set to 'Password Protected' with 'Orbit1969' entered in the password field.

task_completion.description: Verify that comments are disabled for the child page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Discussion' section in the WordPress editor sidebar showing the 'Allow comments' checkbox unchecked.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the WordPress web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to create the pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (e.g., wp-admin) and using the block editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually uploaded the files from the local directory rather than just typing the filenames as text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The WordPress Media Library interface is visible in some screenshots, showing the upload process or the uploaded files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the WordPress posts directly into the MySQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running MySQL commands or scripts; presence of standard WordPress editor UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent page title must be 'History Course Portal'. Child page title must be 'Apollo 11 & 12 Documents'. The child page must have 'History Course Portal' as its parent. The child page must be password protected with the exact password 'Orbit1969'. Comments must be disabled (closed) on the child page. The featured image must be 'saturn_v_diagram.jpg' (or 'saturn_v_diagram'). The child page body must contain links to 'apollo_11_press_kit.pdf' and 'apollo_12_press_kit.pdf'.
